title: The Legendary Con Artist
overview: A naive young woman named Nao is dragged into the Liar Game and seeks the assistance of a notorious conman.

title: Shockwave
overview: Nao and Akiyama crank up the pressure to try to retrieve Nao's millions.

title: Resolution
overview: The first round of the Liar Game reaches its end and a new round begins.

title: Minority Rule
overview: Nao frets over her chance of survival as the rules of the Minority Rule game are explained.
